items.title: 1 Dow Jones Stock to Target This Week and 2 to Avoid
items.description: While the Dow Jones (^DJI) represents industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a safe bet. Some are facing headwinds like declining demand, rising costs, or disruptive new competitors.
